news.title: Takeda signs US$600M AI drug discovery deal with Insilico
news.description: [AI-NEWS] Takeda has entered a strategic collaboration with Hong Kong-based Insilico Medicine to use AI in early-stage drug discovery across the Japanese pharmaceutical company’s therapeutic areas. The companies did not disclose which therapeutic areas or...

news.title: Is AI moving too fast to regulate? UN report flags global safety and rising risks
news.description: [SBS AUSTRALIA] United Nations scientific panel’s first global report warns that artificial intelligence is evolving faster than governments can regulate or keep up with. While AI is driving breakthroughs in healthcare, education and research, experts also raise...

news.title: Unisem to raise up to RM742mil for semiconductor capacity expansion
news.description: [THE STAR] KUALA LUMPUR: Unisem (M) Bhd plans to raise up to RM742mil through a private placement of up to 161.3 million new shares to expand its semiconductor capacity for artificial intelligence (AI) applications and repay borrowings.

news.title: Nutanix Strengthens Agentic AI Governance and Cost Control with Agent Gateway
news.description: [ITWIRE] Nutanix Agent Gateway provides a centralised control point to govern AI agents, secure access to enterprise tools, and monitor token consumption at scale.

news.title: A new, inexpensive Chinese AI model is catching up with Anthropic, OpenAI on their home turf
news.description: [THE JAPAN TIMES ] Z.ai’s GLM-5.2 model has been put at the heart of a growing debate about whether China is finally catching up to the U.S. in the artificial intelligence race.

news.title: Converge joins IBPAP to help in AI readiness
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] CONVERGE ICT Solutions Inc. has joined the IT & Business Process Association of the Philippines (IBPAP) as a Platinum Member to support the business process outsourcing (BPO) industry’s move toward artificial intelligence (AI) readiness.

news.title: Airborne AI spots underwater munitions in shallow seas with high precision
news.description: [PHYS.ORG] A new airborne imaging approach can reliably detect unexploded weapons that lie in shallow coastal waters and remain an ongoing hazard to public safety, marine ecosystems and infrastructure worldwide. By combining advanced multispectral sensing with...

news.title: Leaked video shows Microsoft’s work on a lightweight ‘Copilot OS’ built for AI.
news.description: [THE VERGE] Zac Bowden at Windows Central posted this video of Aion, a stripped-down Windows concept made for agentic AI that popped up on the BetaWiki Discord, and says sources have confirmed to him that it is a real video made in 2024. There’s no indication...

news.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] At an internal meeting, the Meta CEO reportedly said that AI development efforts were not moving as quickly as anticipated.

news.title: Amazon Has New AI Chips for Home Tech Devices and Future Mobile Gadgets
news.description: [CNET] Amazon's head of devices and services discussed the company's focus on artificial intelligence, Alexa Plus and new types of technology to support it.

news.title: Pick n Pay launches AI grocery shopping assistant in South Africa
news.description: [THE STAR] JOHANNESBURG, July 2 (Reuters) - ⁠South African retailer Pick n Pay on Thursday launched an ⁠artificial intelligence-powered shopping assistant that helps customers build grocery orders using ‌voice, text or photos instead of searching for products...

news.title: Microsoft layoffs could affect 4% of its workforce next week
news.description: [FOX BUSINESS] Microsoft layoffs 2026 could eliminate up to 5,700 jobs across Xbox, sales and consulting as the company increases artificial intelligence investments.

news.title: Jersey Mike’s IPO illustrates how bad the AI hype has become
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Just for kicks, I took a look at Jersey Mike's IPO documents. Surely a sandwich shop would have no need to mention AI. But lo and behold.

news.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

news.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

news.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.

news.title: NVIDIA BioNeMo accelerates Anthropic Claude Science
news.description: [AI-NEWS] Anthropic Claude Science now integrates the NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit to accelerate computational life sciences research. Anthropic has launched the public beta of Claude Science, an AI workbench built for scientific research. The platform...

news.title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.

news.title: Deploying retail AI to scale personalisation and customer insight
news.description: [AI-NEWS] Optimising retail AI infrastructure drives the successful deployment of personalisation systems and real-time customer insight. Leaders are replacing static customer interaction patterns with data pipelines capable of modifying the user environment...

news.title: Japan’s answer to its worker shortage: An AI model for 10 million robots
news.description: [AI-NEWS] Japan’s AI robots plan just went from a talking point to a formal national strategy. This week, the government confirmed the numbers everyone’s been quoting: 10 million AI-powered robots deployed across 18 industries by 2040, backed by...

news.title: Bank of England reviews AI rules for agentic AI in finance
news.description: [AI-NEWS] The Bank of England is reviewing whether existing rules can cover the use of agentic AI in finance, including payments, trading, cybersecurity, and operations. Deputy Governor Sarah Breeden said existing regulatory frameworks were not designed for...

news.title: Anthropic deploys Claude Sonnet 5, Fable and Mythos restored
